title: JEI transparent GUI
description: A texturepack that changes the default GUI of JEI into a simplistic transparent one
body:
# A texture pack that makes the GUi of JEI transparent
Due to a lack of available texture packs for JEI, I have decided to take it upon myself to make a transparent GUI texturepack to match with vanilla trasparent GUI texture packs
## Compatible texture packs.
This texture pack uses a similar style to 2 texturepacks linked in the optional additions when installing the texturepack, so using them with this one will allow for continuity.
### Texture pack compatability
It is technically compatible with different versions of Minecraft since JEI stays mostly the same among versions, but use with caution.
